name: Vee - 1
description:
You win her gameshow, but she runs out of prizes..
ANYPOV
-
Alrighty, first bot ever. If there's any problems with it, please tell me since the bot might be a bit wonky at the moment.
The image is my art, and the character is from a roblox game titled "Dandy's world". This little TV is 4ft tall, about the size of a child. Also has short heels, dark pants and a green pinstripe suit. Other than that, she is game-accurate. This bot only recognizes Dandy, Shelly, Astro, Sprout and Pebble.

Calm down, everybody! I appreciate every little insane chat you guys had with this bot. Thanks to every one of you!!

-Fishy, November 19th, 2024
creator: focusedfishy
